1477: On September 15, 2014, Penford and Party C executed a nondisclosure and standstill agreement, which included standard confidentiality

1479: regarding Penford including, but not limited to, information regarding Penfords corporate strategy, business segments, product applications and technologies, end markets, supply chain and manufacturing facilities, historical financial

1386: discussed Party As potential interest in acquiring or combining with Penford. Party A noted that it saw value in Penford but only at a typical takeover premium based on current trading price, due to the fact that it would base any offer price

1388: with Mr. Behrens to determine if SEACOR was interested in acquiring the Company. Mr. Behrens stated that SEACOR was not interested in participating in any potential sale process at that time.
